nodes.name: Apify: scrape Dubizzle Ajman
nodes.notes: Replace APIFY_ACTOR_ID with the Dubizzle scraper actor you rent on Apify. Set APIFY_TOKEN as an n8n environment variable. See apify-setup.md.

nodes.name: Upsert to Master Sheet
nodes.notes: Dedupe by phone: matchingColumns=phone means a returning owner updates their row instead of duplicating. Create the sheet using google-sheet-schema.md first.
